title: Rocket-jumper

'''Rocket-jumpers''' were [[infantry]] units equipped with [[Jetpack|Jump Packs]] and [[Smart Rocket]]s of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War]] against the [[Galactic Empire]] and then [[Standard decade|decades]] later as part of the [[Resistance]] during its [[First Order-Resistance War|conflict]] with the [[First Order]].<ref name="BF2" />

{{Military-stub}}
